name: Yokoy AI Expense Management API
what_it_does: Yokoy AI-powered expense management REST API for enterprise finance teams in Europe to automate expense reports, corporate cards, and supplier invoice processing using machine learning for receipt extraction and policy compliance. Enables AI agents to manage expense report submission and AI-powered data extraction for employee expense automation, handle corporate card transaction reconciliation for spend management automation, access supplier invoice capture and three-way matching for AP automation, retrieve AI compliance checking and policy violation detection for expense audit automation, manage multi-level approval workflow automation for expense governance, handle ERP integration (SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics) for automated accounting posting, access multi-currency and multi-entity consolidation for global enterprise expense automation, retrieve spend analytics and cost center reporting for financial reporting automation, manage travel expense per diem calculation for travel policy compliance automation, and integrate Yokoy with ERP systems, travel platforms, and HR systems for end-to-end enterprise spend management.
use_cases: Processing expense reports from AI extraction automation agents
Reconciling corporate cards from spend management agents
Capturing supplier invoices from AP three-way matching agents
Enforcing expense policy from compliance audit automation agents
not_for: SMB expense management (Yokoy targets enterprise 500+ employees)
best_when: A European enterprise finance team wanting AI agents to automate expense report processing, corporate card reconciliation, supplier invoice AP with three-way matching, and ERP synchronization using Yokoy's AI-powered spend management platform.
avoid_when: SAP INTEGRATION CONFIGURATION COMPLEXITY: Yokoy's SAP integration requires SAP BASIS configuration and custom field mapping; automated ERP posting for SAP S/4HANA requires understanding of SAP posting keys, cost objects, and GL account structure; automated Yokoy-to-SAP posting without SAP configuration review creates incorrect financial statement posting. AI EXTRACTION CONFIDENCE THRESHOLD FOR AUTOMATED POSTING: Yokoy AI extraction provides confidence scores for extracted data; automated posting without confidence threshold enforcement creates accounting errors for low-confidence extractions; establish minimum confidence threshold (typically 85%+) before automated posting and route low-confidence items to human review queue. SWISS LABOR LAW PER DIEM CALCULATION: Yokoy automated per diem calculation for Swiss employees must comply with Swiss Federal Tax Administration (ESTV) expense regulations; automated per diem for international travel by Swiss employees requires city-specific ESTV rates; automated flat-rate per diem calculation without ESTV rate table creates Swiss tax compliance gap.

auth.notes: Yokoy uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. REST API with JSON. Zurich, Switzerland HQ. Founded 2019 by Lars Mangelsdorf, Melanie Gabriel, Michael Fadel, and Philippe Sahli. Backed by Left Lane Capital, Sequoia Capital, and Balderton Capital ($80M+ raised). Enterprise focus (500+ employee companies). Deep SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics ERP integrations. GDPR. ISO27001. Swiss data hosting available. Competes with Payhawk, Spendesk, and Circula for European enterprise expense management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise subscription with implementation fee
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise subscription per user per month; implementation and onboarding fee; custom pricing for large enterprise deployments
pricing.notes: Zurich Switzerland. Sequoia, Balderton backed. Enterprise pricing. Implementation fee required. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; expense and invoice queries throttled; webhooks for expense status, approval, and ERP sync events

known_agent_gotchas: THREE-WAY MATCHING TOLERANCE CONFIGURATION: Yokoy AP three-way matching (PO, GR, invoice) has configurable tolerance for quantity and price variance; automated invoice approval without tolerance configuration creates blocked invoice queue for minor vendor price rounding differences; configure tolerance thresholds before automated three-way matching deployment

AI MODEL RETRAINING IMPACT ON EXTRACTION ACCURACY: Yokoy's AI extraction model updates periodically; automated extraction pipelines may see accuracy changes after model updates; implement extraction accuracy monitoring with alerting for sustained accuracy drops after Yokoy model updates to detect regression before it impacts accounting quality

MULTI-ENTITY INTERCOMPANY EXPENSE ROUTING: Yokoy multi-entity expense routing requires intercompany accounting configuration; automated expense submission for employees working across multiple legal entities must correctly route to the billing entity; automated single-entity posting for cross-entity expenses creates intercompany reconciliation entries that require manual correction

DELEGATE APPROVAL CHAIN DEPTH LIMIT: Yokoy approval chains have maximum depth limits; automated approval workflow configuration for deeply hierarchical organizations must stay within chain depth limits; automated approval routing for organizations with 5+ approval levels requires workflow restructuring to parallel approval instead of sequential

CORPORATE CARD PROGRAM BANK DEPENDENCY: Yokoy corporate cards are issued through partner banks (varies by country); automated card issuance velocity depends on card program bank processing times; automated mass card issuance (e.g., new employee onboarding batch) may have 3-5 business day fulfillment delay from bank processing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise expense management. GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. EU/CH. Employee expense, corporate card, and supplier invoice data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise spend management. GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. EU/CH. Expense, card, and invoice financial data.
